_comment: User base / profile store. 'users' maps a name -> role; 'roles' defines each role's department + the CLEARANCES it holds (security labels the role may see). Whitelist-only: NO deny list, NO wildcard — access exists only where a label is explicitly granted, so a new label grants nobody anything until a role lists it. A memory is visible iff ALL its labels are within the user's clearances (see bouncer.py). Note alice (exec) simply does NOT hold 'legal' — exclusion by omission, not by deny. JSON has no comments, so this '_comment' key is ignored.
